results.rendered_html:
khacita p. p. [khac-kta]
1 Fastened, joined, full of, intermixed with; śakuṃtanīḍakhacitaṃ vibhrajjaṭāmaṃḍalaṃ  Ś. 7. 11. 
2 Mixed, blended.
3 Inlaid, set, studded, in comp.; maṇi˚, ratna˚;  Māl. 8. 10.
